title: IdentityTrustedIssuersConfig
description: JSON shape of the IDENTITY_TRUSTED_ISSUERS environment variable read by the identity-attestation verifier inside /v1-evaluate. Independent trust root from APPROVAL_TRUSTED_ISSUERS — by design, so a compromised approval issuer cannot self-mint a 'human' approval. Keyed by issuer_id then kid. Server-side config only, never on the wire.

additionalProperties.description: Map of kid → key entry. The verifier looks up assertion.issuer.kid here.

key.description: Hex-encoded HS256 secret or Ed25519 raw public key (32 bytes / 64 hex chars). Ed25519 signatures may be hex or base64url; HS256 signatures are hex.

allowed_roles.description: Per-issuer scope: roles this kid may attest. Empty / missing = unscoped.

allowed_environments.description: Per-issuer scope: environments this kid may attest in. Empty / missing = unscoped.
